text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Owie… Guess what happened! I just saw 
a girl over there with an interesting walk…

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm-hmm, I thought to myself, maybe that walk is the secret to her acceleration! What if she's training her pivot foot or something?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So… I tried copying her walk! 
But while my eyes were on her…

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I walked into a post — bonk! My face — bam! Hng… Maybe I should first start with watching where I'm going…
